authorization.scope: WP-09A entry and implementation, trusted-local Vulkan execution, exact engineering budgets, and the WP-09A-only product-open deferral

inherited_contract.rule: WP-09A consumes this contract unchanged; any required API change stops the package for corrective review

outcome: Implement one deliberately off-product mirante4d-render-wgpu runtime against the accepted render-api and dataset lease contracts.
Render honest current partial frames under fixed per-frame work, upload, submission, and GPU-byte ceilings.
Add an unpublished mirante4d-render-reference CPU oracle and compare asynchronous real-Vulkan readback with it and selected hand facts.
Prove lifetime, eviction, replacement, capacity, freshness, cancellation, and stale-frame suppression without activating a second product route.

dependency_contract.reachability: no existing crate may depend on either successor; render-wgpu may depend on render-reference only as a dev dependency

public_api.boundary: public successor types expose no wgpu, current-renderer, UI, storage, filesystem, or owning payload type

frame_budget.exhaustion: report BudgetLimited, retain an honest current partial frame, and continue from a deterministic cursor; capacity rejection submits nothing

gpu_budget.ledger_formula: min(8 GiB, 50% of dedicated VRAM, max(0, dedicated VRAM - 2 GiB)); use 1 GiB while capacity is unknown
gpu_budget.categories: payload residency at most 75%, transfer staging at most 10%, and at least 15% retained for display targets, page tables, and scratch

current_qualification_adapter.name: NVIDIA GeForce RTX 3070 Ti Laptop GPU

fixtures.coverage: valid zero, explicit invalidity, absent resources, MIP, DVR, ISO, and cross-section; 96x96 hand-fact and reference readback
eight resources and 8 MiB on the first frame, one resource and 1 MiB on the second
128 visits on the first frame and one on the second; small configured ledgers cover eviction and capacity

invariants: Only render-wgpu owns successor device, pipelines, staging, VRAM residency, uploads, display targets, frame generations, submissions, and timing queries.
Only genuine accounted leases issued through the accepted dataset runtime enter GPU acceptance tests; fabricated leases cannot qualify the runtime.
Missing resources remain missing coverage, valid zero remains scientific data, and only the current frame generation may become presentable.
No full-residency gate, dense product path, CPU fallback, compatibility route, implicit LOD change, or unaccounted large allocation is permitted.
Timestamps and readback are asynchronous and validation/export-only.
Both new crates forbid unsafe code.
forbidden_paths: all current product, UI, storage, format, importer, project, settings, analysis, and source-loading paths
implementation_checkpoints: A1: accepted entry, exact successor contract, two off-product crate roots, dependency/public-API guards, and verification ownership
A2: CPU reference plus progressive WGPU runtime, genuine runtime-lease fixtures, budgets, typed faults, and public CPU tests
A3: trusted real-Vulkan correctness/lifetime/capacity evidence, asynchronous readback report, documentation, and clean-revision WP-09A closure

verification.readback_tolerance: coverage and validity are exact; RGBA8 output differs by at most one integer code per channel from the independent reference, while selected zero, endpoint, invalidity, and background hand facts are exact
verification.trusted_report: records commit/tree/clean state, executable and fixture digests, adapter/backend/driver/limits, configured and peak ledger categories, frame/upload/submission counters, readback facts, validation errors, and result without private paths or retries
verification.claim: small off-product component correctness only; timings are diagnostic and no product, first-frame, interaction-latency, DS-1 through DS-4, or general performance claim follows

product_open.status: explicitly waived by the repository owner for WP-09A only
product_open.reason: the successor is deliberately unreachable, so opening the current viewer cannot exercise the changed implementation
product_open.alternate_proof: clean-revision trusted real-Vulkan fixture execution with asynchronous readback, CPU-reference and hand-fact comparison, and resource-lifetime evidence
product_open.deferred_gate: WP-09B must exercise the normal native viewer on a real mapped display at 1280x720 and 1920x1080 with relevant data before product render cutover exit

non_goals: Product wiring, UI changes, predecessor-renderer deletion, product-open, packaged E2E, playback, or product performance qualification
WP-10A target-format activation, current schema-1 deletion, import, project, analysis, segmentation, or public-data work
4K, spanning displays, non-Linux platforms, integrated/unified-memory qualification, or public minimum-hardware claims
stop_conditions: The accepted render-api, dataset, or dataset-runtime interfaces require modification.
Any product/app/UI path must change or the successor becomes reachable before WP-09B.
Current renderer code must be copied, imported, wrapped, or retained as an alternate successor path.
Any large allocation cannot be bounded and attributed, missing data renders as zero, stale work becomes presentable, or partial coverage is dishonest.
Real-Vulkan output differs from the reference or hand facts outside declared exact integer and float tolerance rules.
Qualification requires a CPU/software fallback, synchronous per-frame wait/readback, retry, skipped required case, or more than 900 seconds.

rollback.unit: A1 and A2 are independently revertible; A3 is the atomic WP-09A closure checkpoint
rollback.action: revert the failed checkpoint and delete ignored evidence output; do not add a fallback or compatibility renderer
rollback.product_rollback: none because WP-09A changes no reachable product authority
